text1: Facial hair is an asset that can make a man look rugged or strong. Since there are a variety of beard shapes that can perform wonders for your personal styles, thus making it an irreplaceable part of the men’s face. However, individuals from around the world face beard hair loss due to genetic factors, injury, or alopecia. Luckily, they can undergo beard reconstruction with our skilled facial hair transplant specialist at <color>Asli Tarcan</color>. Here we offer an unparalleled combination of quality and affordability. Likewise, Turkey has emerged as a premier destination for beard transplant procedures, attracting individuals worldwide seeking to enhance their facial hair. In this comprehensive guide, we delve into the world of beard transplant in Turkey while exploring procedures, costs, success rate and key insights. So, read along to discover how our specialized beard hair restoration services in Turkey can help you to achieve the beard you desire.
text2: Beard transplant is a surgical procedure that restores or enhances facial hair growth by transplanting hair follicles from the donor area (typically the back and sides of the head) to the recipient area (beard, mustache, or sideburns).
text3: Beard transplant utilizes the same fundamental hair transplantation techniques as scalp transplants. Hair follicles are extracted from the head and strategically implanted to create the patient’s desired facial hair pattern. While the hair from the head may differ slightly in color and texture from the patient’s natural facial hair, this discrepancy is typically unnoticeable. Thus, resulting in a remarkably natural appearance. Facial hair transplantation generally involves the following three main techniques. <header>FUE (Follicular Unit Extraction)</header> <color>FUE</color> is a popular hair transplantation procedure that involves extraction and transplantation of individual follicles. Likewise, it does not involve the need for a linear incision, thus making it a painless and scar-less beard transplant procedure. Our surgeons use a specialized tool to accomplish high efficiency and effectivity. However, the grafting procedure is similar to the FUT method. <header>DHI (Direct Hair Implantation)</header> <color>DHI</color> has recently gained popularity for beard transplant as it is quick and produces high-quality results. Using advanced techniques, hair from the donor area is harvested and directly implanted into the beard, bypassing the storage phase. This streamlined process fosters swift and natural hair growth with minimum downtime. <header>Strip Harvesting</header> A transplant surgery that is also known as FUT (Follicular unit transplantation). It involves using a linear strip of hair-bearing skin removed from the donor area and implanted on the beard.
text4:
Although beard transplant is considered minimally invasive, certain criteria must be met to ensure eligibility and optimal results. Therefore, understanding these steps will help you to make an informed decision for your cosmetic surgery.

• Men with stable hair loss or thinning in the beard area.
• Individuals with uneven or patchy beard growth.
• Those with facial scarring or burns affecting beard growth.
• Individuals seeking to enhance or restore their natural beard design.
• Men having sufficient donor hair (from the scalp or body).
• Have compatible hair type (e.g., similar texture, color).
• No active infections or skin conditions (e.g., folliculitis, acne).
• Stable medical conditions (e.g., diabetes, hypertension).
• Typically 25–55 years old.
• Have good overall health.
• Having realistic expectations from hair grafting.
text5:
Once you have established your candidacy for the best beard hair transplant in Turkey, it is important to start preparing yourself for transplant surgery.

Since the outcome of the plastic surgery is dependent on your overall physical and psychological health. Although, our experts can develop a customized plan to help you get in the best shape for the procedure. Here are general guidelines that will also support you:

• Stop smoking and tobacco use.
• Limit alcohol consumption.
• Avoid blood-thinning medications (e.g., aspirin, warfarin).
• Avoid intense exercise and physical activity.
• Stop using hair growth supplements e.g. minoxidil or finasteride.
• Avoid tight clothing, helmets, and hats.
• Start Anti-inflammatory medication (if prescribed).
• Stop eating high-sodium foods.
• Wash and clean the scalp and beard area regularly.
• Understand the procedure and risks.
• Plan for post-op recovery.
text6: Facial hair restoration and transplantation surgery is a simple and outpatient procedure. Therefore, we are making this a viable option for individuals on medical tourism. Moreover, advancements in hair transplantation techniques have made it possible for individuals to have their procedure completed in the minimum time with least downtime. The following are general steps for beard transplant: Step 1: Consultation (30 minutes) Many individuals do not take initial consultation, rather rush for the procedure. However, at our clinic in Istanbul, we ensure to set the consultation record straight. Since, it will help us to understand your desires from the procedure. Moreover, our experts will be better placed designing a hair loss solution according to your requirements. Further, you can also get all your doubts wiped away by asking surgeons about potential risks and outcomes. Likewise, hair analysis will reveal the best option for your transplant. It will support surgeons to develop a customized plan to optimize the procedure results. Step 2: Preparation (30 minutes) Our team of experts will prepare you for the procedure by marking the recipient area (beard). They will also perform a hair and scalp analysis to assess overall health. Moreover, photographs are also taken for before and after comparison. Step 3: Harvesting (2 to 4 hours) This is the main part of the procedure, and it kick starts after you have gotten the local anesthesia. Our surgeons will extract the hair follicles from the donor area using either FUE or DHI methods. Collected follicles are dissected into individual units for further processing. Generally, a hollow micro-needle having a diameter of 0.7mm is used to separate root hair from the surrounding skin. Step 4: Transplantation (2 to 4 hours) Our hair transplant surgeons will then prepare the recipient site by creating tiny incisions in the beard area. It is an important part, as it will support the natural growth of hair at angles and direction to mimic natural hair growth. Moving forward, they will implant hair follicles into recently prepared recipient sites. Depending on the quantity of donor graft, they will place follicles to achieve natural-looking density and pattern. Step 5: Closure (30 minutes) Upon successful completion of the FUE beard transplant, our surgeons will finish the procedure by giving you post-op instructions. Further, they will apply topical cream or ointments and bandaging the donor areas. You can also enquire about recovery.
title6: Post Beard Transplant Care and Recovery
text7:
The intended facial hair design is dependent on how careful you stay about post-op instructions. This can make or break the outcome of the procedure. Thus, making it one of the most vital parts of the beard hair restoration cycle.

Since, specific instructions are provided by our experts. Here are general guidelines to follow to boast transplantation results and minimize downtime:

• Rest, relax and avoid strenuous activities.
• Apply cold compresses to reduce swelling.
• Take prescribed pain medication.
• Keep the transplanted area moist with spray, topical creams or ointments.
• Avoid direct water and sun exposure.
• Avoid scratching or touching the transplanted area for at least 2–3 weeks.
• Clean the transplanted area with mild soap and water.
• Minimize combing/brushing (until advised).
• Minimize facial expressions and mouth movements (2–3 weeks).
• Report any increased pain, swelling, redness or discharge.
• Avoid scraping or rubbing for the first week.
• Gentle cleaning can begin 2–3 days post-op to remove crusts and promote healing.
text8:
Aslı Tarcan is the best beard transplant clinic in Turkey as we have the right expertise, equipment and long list of satisfactory customers. In addition to bringing your natural beard hair back, transplant also offers numerous other benefits.

Further, you will start experiencing 50% hair growth in just five months. While, transplant results appear to offer 100% hair growth up to one year of the surgery.

Here is a short list of pros of the Turkish beard transplant.

• Minimally invasive
• No scalpels, staples or sutures
• No linear scarring
• No downtime
• Immediate results
• Natural looking beard growth
• Permanent results
• Balanced facial features
• No need for daily beard care products
• Increased self-assurance in social situations
• High success rate (95-100%), low complication rate (<5%) and high patient satisfaction rate (90-95%)
title8: What Factors Make Beard Transplant Inadvisable?
text9:
Although beard transplant in Istanbul is open for all individuals coming from around the world including Europe and Middle East. However, there are certain limitations that do not allow certain patients to opt for this procedure.

Our dermatology department will carefully examine your qualification for the procedure and advise if you are the right candidate or not.

Here is a list of contraindications for beard transplant in Turkey:

• Individuals having an active infection (e.g., folliculitis, impetigo)
• Patients with Uncontrolled medical conditions (e.g., diabetes, hypertension)
• If you are having Blood disorders (e.g., hemophilia, bleeding disorders)
• Insufficient donor hair
• Unstable hair loss
• Hair loss due to medication
• Hair loss due to chemical or radiation treatment
• Previous facial surgery complications
• Under 25 years old (hair loss may still be progressing)
• Over 60 years old (may have decreased hair growth)
text10:
Beard and mustache transplant in Turkey pose almost no side effects. Due to the surgical nature of beard transplantation, which involves incisions, some individuals may experience side effects.

Further, these are minor side effects and generally fade away within two to three weeks of the procedure. The most common side effects of beard transplantation include the following:

• Swelling, bruising, itching and numbness
• Redness and inflammation
• Scabbing and crusting
• Mild pain and discomfort
• Temporary hair shedding (2-4 weeks)
• Dry skin and flakiness
• Infection (less than 1% of cases)
• Ingrown hairs
• Allergic reactions to medications or products
text11: As we have seen, beard transplant is not suitable for everyone. Therefore, patients, not ideal for a beard transplant, start looking for alternatives. Luckily, there are numerous other options that can support them with beard growth. As, you will come across numerous beard growth solutions in the market. Nevertheless, it is important that you stay updated to avoid any scams. Here are a few popular alternatives that you select if you are unfit for a beard transplant in Turkey. Drugs Numerous hair growth drugs are available in the market and widely used for restoration of lost hair. You can easily come across drugs in different forms like pills, topical creams and foams. However, the cons of taking such over-the-counter medications is that you can never stop taking them. Therefore, making them not an ideal solution for permanent hair growth. Supplements Another option to improve beard hair growth is to take supplements containing Vitamin Biotin (B7), as it fosters healthy hair growth. Additionally, you can find other similar supplements to try as an alternative for hair transplant. Lifestyle Behaviors Although hair growth is largely dependent on genetics, certain lifestyle behaviors can help you accelerate beard hair growth. Such behaviors include regular exercise to improve your blood circulation, which increases hair follicle health. Further, diet rich in lean proteins, zinc, whole grain and fruits with vitamins A, B, C, D and E can also boost hair growth. Getting a sleep of around 7 to 8 hours each night will also have a positive impact on your hair growth.
text12: Is a 5000 graft beard transplant safe? It is perfectly safe, as most experienced beard transplant surgeons would use a combination of FUE and DHI hair transplant harvest to achieve this feat. Generally, this is completed in a single session and considered the best option for 5000 grafts. However, it is essential to consult with a qualified surgeon to assess your individual case and ensure the best results. How many grafts are required for a full beard transplant? Generally, you will need between 2,000–2,500 grafts to have a full beard transplant. Do beard transplants work? Yes! Beard transplant has a high success rate as most patients can get their desired results with just one surgery. Usually, the second surgery is needed to improve hair thickness or modify results. Can I shave after a beard transplant? You should avoid shaving the transplanted area at least for 10 days. It will allow your grafts to securely take roots in the skin. Moreover, consult your surgeon before resuming grooming activities. Can a beard transplant look natural? The results of a beard transplant can give a natural look if it is performed by an experienced surgeon. Likewise, the results also depend on how much you follow post-op instructions. What is the best method for beard transplant? FUE technique is the most used in facial hair transplant. It is mainly due to its minimum downtime, no side effects or scars. Is beard transplant permanent? Yes, Turkey beard transplant is permanent, as you will start experiencing hair growth within 5 months post-surgery.
